hero.description: Join our network of vetted professionals. We bring the customers, you do what you do best.

list.title: Competitive Pay
list.desc: Earn top rates with transparent pricing and no hidden fees.

list.title: Flexible Schedule
list.desc: Work when you want. Accept jobs that fit your availability.

list.title: Steady Customers
list.desc: We bring the customers to you, no more chasing leads.

list.title: Build Your Reputation
list.desc: Earn reviews and grow your business through our platform.

steps.title: Apply
steps.desc: Fill out a quick application with your skills and experience.

steps.title: Get Approved
steps.desc: We verify your background and qualifications.

steps.title: Start Earning
steps.desc: Begin receiving jobs and get paid reliably.

cta.title: Ready to join the Doorstep team?
cta.description: We're always looking for skilled, reliable professionals to join our growing network.
